note: tsc-leadership-modal built + MCP-verified (Ready to Review; deploy-gated on IX2 deletion)

queue.title: Rebuild leadership team modal in vanilla JS (drop Webflow IX2)
queue.description: Reproduce the /leadership .card_team open + .modal2_background-overlay close interactions (Webflow IX2 a-146/a-147) as a bindLeadershipModals() function in init.js: identical 500ms outQuad slide + 500ms ease overlay fade, plus accessibility (role=dialog, focus trap, ESC, body scroll-lock, focus-return) and prefers-reduced-motion. User deletes the two IX2 interactions in Designer; deploy swaps the jsDelivr @hash in the site footer and adds closed-state CSS to the leadership page head via Webflow MCP.

queue.title: Migrate 7 historic WordPress blog posts to Webflow CMS
queue.description: Extract 7 remaining blog posts (2019-2021) from WordPress SQL dump, optimise 3 featured images to AVIF, upload to Webflow CMS News collection via MCP with correct published dates, categories, and draft status.

queue.title: Parallelise init.js script loading with Promise.all
queue.description: Rewrite sequential await loops in init.js to use 2-wave Promise.all for vendor deps and batched Promise.all for 18 modules (orchestrator + utils last). Removes ~20 sequential round-trips.

queue.title: Add terser minification pipeline for RHP modules
queue.description: Add terser devDependency, create scripts/minify.js, generate .min.js files for all 20+ modules, commit to repo for jsDelivr serving. Stacks on Phase 1.

queue.title: Sitewide JSON-LD structured data for all Carsa page types
queue.description: 27 HTML template files with JSON-LD schema for every page type on carsa.co.uk — Organization, WebSite, Product/Vehicle, Article, AutoDealer, Service, FAQPage, BreadcrumbList, and more. Optimised for Google Rich Results and AEO.

queue.title: Redirect model dropdown selection to model sub-page on used-cars
queue.description: Superseded by carsa-make-model-switch-v2.

queue.title: Pre-fill dropdowns on make/model pages with redirect on change
queue.description: Superseded by carsa-make-model-switch-v2.

queue.title: Make/model switch v2: desktop immediate, mobile deferred, no prefill
queue.description: Rewrite make-model-redirect.js. VSRP desktop: no redirect (pure Finsweet filter). Mobile all pages: select make/model, prefetch destination, redirect on #mobile-search-submit tap. Make/model pages desktop: immediate redirect on change. No prefill anywhere.

queue.title: Fix about slider autoheight timing and R icon FOUC on reload
queue.description: Slider autoheight measures before Webflow reinits on Barba transition. R icon is 100svh before JS sets CSS vars. Fix: double-rAF + fonts.ready/load guards in slider, max-height:50svh CSS fallback with sentinel var, revealAboutContent on direct load, defer about view destroy to after slide-out on about→home.

queue.title: Fix iOS mobile dial video question mark icon and browser bar displacement
queue.description: iOS Safari shows native ? icon on sourceless fg-video before JS sets src. Fix: CSS visibility:hidden on mobile, early src preload from CMS, reveal gate after readyState >= 2. Browser bar: use visualViewport.height for freeze, re-freeze on VP resize.

queue.title: Fix dial tick centering drift on mobile after Barba transitions
queue.description: Canvas tick ring drifts off-centre on mobile after Barba return to home. Root fix: derive geom.cx/cy from fgWrap position (CSS source of truth) instead of canvas center. Backstop: extend self-healing to validate center coordinates, not just radius.

queue.title: Fix fg-video flash during work to home and work to work transitions
queue.description: FG video briefly disappears during Barba transitions. Work→Home: clearProps removes inline opacity, CSS opacity:0 takes effect for 1 frame before resume sets it back. Work→Work: default fallback destroys everything. Fix: re-assert opacity:1 after clearProps, remove mobile guard, add dedicated work→work transition.

queue.title: Page loader on uncached load — CSS fade on scriptsOk
queue.description: Show .loader container on all pages during uncached load. Pure CSS transition + class toggle on <html>. Fades out (0.4s) when RHP.scriptsOk is set, then removed from DOM. Changes: init.js (extend inline style + add class toggle after scriptsOk) + ready-hit-play.css (permanent loader rules). No new module.

queue.title: Migrate custom code to client-owned GitHub repo — fork Egenix JS, remove duplicate Lenis, align GSAP versions
queue.description: Move all custom JS off third-party dependencies into a client-owned GitHub repo served via jsDelivr. 5 phases: (1) Download and audit Egenix main.js from pinned jsDelivr commit. (2) Create courtesymasters/cm-webflow repo with cleaned code. (3) Replace Webflow head/body embed URLs — swap Egenix jsDelivr to client repo, remove duplicate Lenis from body, align ScrollTrigger to 3.12.5 from same CDN as GSAP, remove redundant noopener script, move Google Ads tag into GTM. (4) Verify on staging — test all interactions, forms, smooth scroll, CMS filtering. (5) Publish, monitor 48h, contact Egenix to inform migration complete. See intake report for full migration plan.

queue.title: Unpublish 7 dev and test pages currently live and indexable
queue.description: Set to draft: /dev/components, /dev/department-cms-item---test, /dev/insight-cms-item---test, /dev/job-cms-item---test, /untitled (BUILD MODE DEMO), /styles/components, /styles/styles. All are indexable and contribute to crawl budget waste.

queue.title: SEO foundation — OG and Twitter tags, heading hierarchy, alt text, JobPosting schema, sitemap fix, thin template pages
queue.description: 6 items: (1) Add OG + Twitter meta tags on all key pages using Webflow built-in fields, add og:image 1200x630. (2) Fix heading hierarchy — one H1 per page, sequential H2-H3-H4 (homepage, /for-candidates, /for-royals confirmed broken). (3) Add image alt text site-wide — prioritise homepage, service pages, team photos (WCAG 2.1 Level A). (4) Add JobPosting JSON-LD schema to 22 live job listings for Google for Jobs. (5) Fix sitemap to include CMS item URLs (jobs, insights, case studies). (6) Disable template pages for 7 taxonomy-only collections generating thin content.

queue.title: AEO remediation — move from L1 to L3 with structured FAQ blocks, answer-first copy, and schema coverage
queue.description: Homepage scored 3/20 (L1 Invisible) on AEO audit. Target L3 (Extractable): add FAQPage schema to 30 FAQs, restructure key pages with answer-first lead paragraphs and question-format H2s, add freshness signals (last updated dates), add author/entity attribution. Depends on SEO foundation completion. Full audit at .claude/audits/aeo.md.

queue.title: About page scroll accordions — ScrollTrigger height auto reveal on .accordion-content, 35% from bottom trigger, reverse on scroll-back
queue.description: New module about-scroll-accordions.js. One ScrollTrigger per .accordion-title in .section_about-hero. When title scrolls to 35% from bottom of viewport (start: 'top 65%'), GSAP tweens sibling .accordion-content from height:0/opacity:0 to height:auto/opacity:1 over 0.75s power3.out. toggleActions 'play none none reverse' handles scroll-back. Multiple open simultaneously. Standard RHP IIFE pattern with gsap.context, init/destroy. Orchestrator wires via views.about. ~50 LOC, 3 files.

queue.title: About slider auto-height — MutationObserver on .about-slider to match active slide height
queue.description: Standalone module about-slider-autoheight.js. Scopes to .about-slider elements on the about page. MutationObserver watches .w-slide aria-hidden attribute changes, sets closest .w-slider height to active slide's clientHeight. Follows standard RHP module pattern (IIFE, window.RHP, init/destroy). Orchestrator integration in RHP.views.about. ~50 LOC, 3 files.

queue.title: Dial engaged tick lock + dynamic sector count from CMS items
queue.description: Two changes to work-dial.js: (1) When dial enters ENGAGED state, smoothly tween attractionEase to 0 so ticks return to base length, communicating that project switching is locked. Gate hasAttraction on dialState !== ENGAGED. (2) Remove Math.min(8, N) cap so sector count matches actual CMS items. Make FLAT_TICKS proportional at ~67% of ticks per sector. Single file, ~15 LOC. Low complexity.

queue.title: Video overlays — 45% BG dark overlay on all pages, 15% FG overlay on homepage with Barba transition fade
queue.description: Add CSS ::after pseudo-element overlays to the dial videos. BG overlay (rgba(0,0,0,0.45)) on .dial_layer-bg across all namespaces. FG overlay (rgba(0,0,0,0.15)) on #fg-video-wrap scoped to data-dial-ns=home, with GSAP --fg-overlay-opacity custom property tween during home↔work Barba transitions. ~40 LOC across ready-hit-play.css and orchestrator.js.

queue.title: AI search and AEO skill — audit rubric, copywriting rules, page structure patterns, agent and command integration
queue.description: Create a new monorepo skill ai-search-aeo combining insights from Webflow AEO and AI search blog posts into a single reference the seo, content, and schema agents plus /copy-review and /intake commands can pull from. Contains a 20-check audit rubric across 5 categories (schema, answer structure, freshness, authority, technical), answer-first copywriting rules with design-context hook for brand voice, page structure patterns (cite-magnet archetypes, anchor and cluster architecture, FAQ blocks), and an optional 5-level content maturity assessment for site-wide strategic reviews. Integration: seo agent adds AEO bullet under Scope, content agent adds AEO writing rules section, schema agent adds FAQPage and HowTo priority note, /copy-review loads the skill in the content context block, /intake Phase 4 adds a fourth AEO stream that saves findings to .claude/audits/<client>/aeo.md.

queue.title: Home intro mobile — fg hidden, 250svh section, logo fade, auto-engage ACTIVE, dial position fix, bg canvas fix
queue.description: Fix 6 mobile home intro issues (≤991px): (1) CSS hide dial_layer-fg on touch devices, (2) section_home-intro 250svh on mobile, (3) logo fade-out as section exits viewport, (4) auto-engage ACTIVE on morph complete via new RHP.workDial.forceActive(), (5) dial position fix for 250svh layout, (6) bg canvas visible when ACTIVE auto-engages. Approach B: fork buildTimeline() with buildMobileTimeline() in home-scroll-morph.js. 3 files: CSS, home-scroll-morph.js, work-dial.js. ~200 LOC.

queue.title: Home intro scroll choreography — logo + transition dial GSAP Flip.fit scrubbed morph, swap to work-dial, nav animate-in
queue.description: Choreograph the homepage intro scroll animation. On load: large #interactive-logo in .home-intro_middle, small transition-dial in .home-intro_bottom, main work-dial opacity 0, nav hidden. As user scrolls .section_home-intro (100vh), GSAP Flip.fit scrubbed via ScrollTrigger moves dial from bottom→middle (grows to large) and logo from middle→top (shrinks to small). At morph complete: hide intro section, show main work-dial, animate nav items in (except nav logo), step text SplitText entrance, unlock dial, lock scroll. Replay on nav logo click. Barba re-entry via skipToEnd. Reduced motion fast-path. Supersedes rhp-home-intro-scroll-morph and rhp-home-intro-dial-flip-lock.

queue.title: Home intro refined: dial locked idle at start slot, Flip-fit scrubbed morph to middle slot, step text reveal, nav visibility via class toggle
queue.description: Superseded by rhp-home-intro-scroll-choreography (2026-04-14). Original: Refine the in-progress home intro flow so the dial begins in a fully locked idle state at a new .home_dial-start slot.

queue.title: Home intro section: scroll-driven logo morph, dial small to large expand, about slide transitions, nav logo replay
queue.description: Superseded by rhp-home-intro-scroll-choreography (2026-04-14). Original: Add an intro section on home with the large interactive logo.

queue.title: Carsa Webflow skill v2 — planning phase, build log, MCP fallback, verification, /carsa-build command
queue.description: Restructure carsa-webflow skill with XML tags, add planning phase with component template page check, build log for weekly review, Slack reporting (MCP + copy-paste fallback), MCP fallback pipeline, dynamic verification checklist, and /carsa-build command.

queue.title: Check finance link — build eligibility URL with VRM and UTMs, open in new tab
queue.description: Click handler on [data-link='check-finance'] builds https://quote.carsa.co.uk/eligibility/questions?vrm={VRM} with stored UTM attribution, opens in new tab. Ancestor <a> href swap on hover for browser URL preview. Vanilla JS, event delegation for Finsweet dynamic loads.

queue.title: Dev/CDN source switch via URL param + localStorage
queue.description: URL-param toggle (?rhp=local / ?rhp=cdn) with localStorage persistence to switch init.js module loading between localhost and CDN without changing the Webflow head block.

queue.title: Fix dial CSS namespace selectors broken after Barba about→home transition
queue.description: Replace .dial_component:has([data-barba-namespace]) CSS selectors with [data-dial-ns] attribute selectors. Root cause: about page Barba container is a sibling of dial_component (not a descendant), so :has() never matches. Extend data-dial-ns to all namespaces (home, about, case, contact). ~30 CSS rules + orchestrator.js setAttribute calls.

queue.title: Video transition cluster: suspend/resume for home↔case, rectangular FG, autoplay, pool fix
queue.description: Cluster fix for 4 bugs: (1) videos destroyed during home↔case transitions — add suspend()/resume() to work-dial.js, (2) FG video circular during morph — snap borderRadius to 0, (3) videos don't autoplay after Barba — explicit play() in afterEnter, (4) pool switching broken after round-trip — preload adjacent slots on resume. See spec for full architecture.

queue.title: Case transition polish: video sizing, scroll-to-top, fg-video visibility after resume
queue.description: Three fixes for home↔case transitions after suspend/resume shipped: (1) FG video fills 100% of container during expand — should use calc(--dial-case-height - --dial-case-title-gap) leaving room for title peek, with responsive gap (140/120/100/80px). (2) Case→home: scroll dialFg to top before shrink so video is visible. (3) After case→home resume, fg-video invisible — clearProps wipes dialFg opacity but setDialState bails on same-state; force re-apply in _resumeFn.

queue.title: About page cluster: scroll + reveals + dial visibility + HIT logo hover
queue.description: Cluster fix for 2 bugs: (1) scroll broken + GSAP reveals hidden + HIT logo hover dead — Lenis double-start orphans scroll listeners, fix by letting runAfterEnter own Lenis; add gsap.context() to about-text-lines; fix HIT logo selector fallback. (2) Dial missing after transition — about_dial-wrapper visibility:hidden never cleared; add clearProps in runAfterEnter. See spec for full architecture.

queue.title: Transition polish cluster: dial state handoff for about→home + overlay flash fix
queue.description: Cluster fix for 2 bugs: (1) dial_layer-fg not scrolled to top on case→about, dial boots IDLE at index 0 on about→home instead of showing just-visited project in ACTIVE — add aboutHandoff save/consume + startIndex/startActive init options. (2) About→home overlay fades 450ms early exposing large logo — pin overlay at opacity:1 during reverse, manual fade after completion; measure nav logo position live instead of hard-coded 2vh. See spec for full architecture.

queue.title: Dial: mobile interaction upgrade (specification pending)
queue.description: Upgrade dial to work on mobile according to spec (to be provided). Blocked waiting for specification.

queue.title: Mobile: autoplay video fallback when autoplay is blocked
queue.description: Figure out fallback behaviour when autoplay is blocked on mobile. Affects: homepage foreground/background videos, work page hero videos, work page laptop videos, work page column layout videos.

queue.title: Mobile: responsiveness pass across all pages
queue.description: General mobile responsiveness pass across all pages — home, about, work, contact.

queue.title: Update laptop mockup assets on work pages
queue.description: Replace current laptop mockup images/videos with updated versions on work pages.

queue.title: About page: team section animations
queue.description: Add animations to the team section on the about page.

queue.title: Video title: responsive text scaling across breakpoints
queue.description: Video title text needs responsive scaling across breakpoints.

queue.title: Video performance: lower quality backgrounds, tighter foreground resolution
queue.description: Add lower quality videos for background (always shown blurred, can use much lower resolution). Tighten foreground video resolution to reduce bandwidth and decode overhead.

queue.title: Nav compass — rotary switch navigation (reusable 2/3/4 links)
queue.description: Three-way rotary switch with compass dial. Anchor links: Surface=home, Dive=below, Contact=contact. Hover primes dial ~10deg, click rotates + scrolls. Reusable pattern for 2-4 links. Accessible (aria-hidden dial, reduced-motion skip). Webflow component.

queue.title: Hero background — decorative SVG arch shape
queue.description: Single organic SVG arch shape (Figma 16:522) behind hero text. Absolute positioned, full-width. Webflow structure built (sz-hero-section + sz-hero-bg embed). CSS in styles/studio-zissou.css. SVG renders but needs colour/visibility debugging — shape fill #E1E3DC is very subtle against #EBEDE6 page background. Webflow component.

queue.title: Hero title — 'Studio Zissou' + tagline with SplitText entrance
queue.description: Character-by-character entrance animation via GSAP SplitText (or SVG path animation if SVG format chosen). Tagline follows after title. Format TBD (text vs SVG for viewport-width scaling). Section-level element in hero.

queue.title: Intro text — right-aligned body paragraphs
queue.description: Two-paragraph intro block, right-aligned. PP Rader Regular 14px, #2A2A2A. Static, no animation. Section-level element in hero.

queue.title: Work clients — CMS list with hover preview images + bracket chars
queue.description: CMS-driven client list. Hover fades in preview image at fixed position. All clients have external URLs with ↗ arrow. Font feature settings for bracket characters. CMS collection: name, preview image, URL, display order. Section-level element in work.

queue.title: Decorative ovals — breathing gills animation (Ghibli-inspired)
queue.description: Five oval SVGs. Inner SVG flips horizontally (scaleX), cascading right-to-left with stagger, 4s pause, repeat. Ghibli airship breathing gills aesthetic. GSAP timeline. Section-level element in gills.

queue.title: Quality cards — scroll-triggered reveal (Interfaces/Code/Decisions)
queue.description: Three cards with corner pins and dashed connectors. ScrollTrigger-driven reveal: line draws, corners appear, content fades in. Decorative elements, no interaction. Webflow component.

queue.title: Contact CTA — heading + body + scroll anchor (mobile only)
queue.description: 'Let's Talk It Through' heading, body paragraph, 'Get in touch →' anchor link. Link scrolls to form on mobile only (form stacks below on mobile). Section-level element in contact.

queue.title: Contact form — postcard/telegram styled Webflow native form
queue.description: Vintage postcard aesthetic. Italian labels, SZ monogram, Name/Email/Message fields with dashed underlines. Webflow native form submission. Placeholder copy TBD. Webflow component.

queue.title: Class UUID Registry + Duplicate Cleanup
queue.description: Capture real project class UUIDs from Designer via CDP, use them during wf-gen to avoid duplicate classes on paste. Plus MCP-based cleanup command for existing duplicates.

queue.title: Footer — © SZ, logo/trumpet, Privacy · Terms
queue.description: Simple flex row: © SZ left, SZ logo/trumpet graphic centre, Privacy · Terms right. Webflow component.

queue.title: Hero section — assemble nav-compass, hero-background, hero-title, intro-text
queue.description: Build the hero section: full-bleed layout with hero-background (component), nav-compass (component), hero-title (section element, SplitText animation), and intro-text (section element, right-aligned). Absolute positioning for background and title layers.

queue.title: Work section — CMS client list with hover previews
queue.description: Build the work section: contains work-clients (section element). CMS-bound client list with hover preview images, bracket characters, ↗ external links. Set up Projects/Clients CMS collection.

queue.title: Gills section — decorative ovals with breathing animation
queue.description: Build the gills section: contains decorative-ovals (section element). Five SVG ovals with cascading scaleX flip animation, 4s pause, repeat. GSAP timeline. Ghibli-inspired breathing gills.

queue.title: Quality section — scroll-triggered card reveal
queue.description: Build the quality section: contains quality-cards (component). 'Respect for Quality' heading, body text, 3 scroll-triggered cards (Interfaces/Code/Decisions) with corner pins and dashed connectors. ScrollTrigger timeline.

queue.title: Contact section — CTA + postcard form layout
queue.description: Build the contact section: two-column layout with contact-cta (section element) left and contact-form (component) right. Stacks on mobile with scroll anchor.

queue.title: Footer section — assemble footer component
queue.description: Build the footer section: wraps the footer component. Simple section wrapper with appropriate spacing and background.

queue.title: Replace component placeholders in style guide as each component is built
queue.description: As each SZ component is built, update the style guide page with live examples replacing placeholder sections.

queue.title: Site review: finding schema, logger, and configuration thresholds
queue.description: Project scaffold at tools/site-review/. Create the unified Finding data model (createFinding/validateFinding), DEBUG-gated logger, and config module with severity thresholds for all checks. Foundation for all subsequent stages.

queue.title: Site review: page fetcher with cache and sitemap discovery
queue.description: Shared page fetcher that caches HTML, headers, status code, and redirect chain per URL per run. Sitemap.xml parser with fallback to manual --pages flag. Every check module depends on these utilities.

queue.title: Site review: HTML checks — meta tags, image alt text, security headers
queue.description: First three checks, all pure HTML parsers. Meta tags checks title, description, OG, and canonical. Image alt detects missing alt attributes. Security headers checks HSTS, CSP, X-Frame-Options, and others. Validates the check module contract pattern.

queue.title: Site review: network checks — broken links, redirect chains, mixed content, PageSpeed Insights
queue.description: Four checks involving network requests. Broken links sends HTTP HEAD requests with concurrency limit. Redirect chains follows hops and reports loops. Mixed content detects HTTP resources on HTTPS pages. PageSpeed Insights calls the free Google API for Core Web Vitals and Lighthouse scores.

queue.title: Site review: custom code extraction and AI review via Playwright and Claude
queue.description: Use Playwright to visit each page and extract inline scripts, styles, and Webflow embed blocks. Filter out known CDN libraries. Send custom code to Claude API for quality analysis, refactoring suggestions, and security review.

queue.title: Site review: check runner, report generators, and CLI entry point — tier one complete
queue.description: Runner dynamically loads check modules, runs them in parallel, collects and validates findings. JSON and markdown report generators output to reports/<domain>-<date>/. CLI entry point with --url, --tier, --pages, --skip flags. Tier one health check is fully functional after this stage.

queue.title: Site review: CSV importers for Screaming Frog and SE Ranking exports
queue.description: Parse Screaming Frog pages and links CSV exports plus SE Ranking audit CSV into the unified Finding schema. Normalise and deduplicate imported findings against automated findings. Uses Node readline, no external CSV library.

queue.title: Site review: accessibility deep-dive and tier two integration
queue.description: Accessibility check using axe-core via Playwright — contrast, form labels, ARIA, focus states, heading hierarchy. Wire CSV importers into the runner for --tier 2 flow. Add --sf-pages, --sf-links, --se-ranking CLI flags. Tier two full review is complete after this stage.

queue.title: Local SEO foundation — config module and SEMRush HTTP API client
queue.description: Create tools/local-seo/ directory. Build config.js (dotenv, API key management for SEMRUSH_API_KEY, ANTHROPIC_API_KEY, HUNTER_API_KEY) and lib/semrush.js (HTTP client wrapping SEMRush API endpoints: domain_rank, domain_organic, backlinks_overview, phrase_this, tracking_position_organic). Follow tools/site-review/ patterns: named exports, createLogger, error handling. Unit tests for config loading and mocked API responses.

queue.title: Local SEO monthly report generator — Claude narrative + HTML template
queue.description: Build lib/report-gen.js (feeds SEMRush data + site health metrics to Claude, generates plain-English narrative with wins/issues/recommendations) and lib/templates/monthly-report.html (branded HTML report template). Claude prompt emphasises jargon-free language, specific numbers, and actionable next steps. Unit tests with fixture data.

queue.title: Local SEO report CLI — index-report.js orchestrator with --client and --all flags
queue.description: Build index-report.js CLI entry point. Reads client config from clients/<slug>.json, pulls SEMRush data (parallel: domain_rank + keyword positions + backlinks_overview), optionally runs site-review subset (meta-tags, psi), feeds all data to report-gen.js, renders HTML report to output/<slug>/reports/YYYY-MM.html. Flags: --client <slug>, --all, --verbose, --skip-site-review. Add npm script to package.json.

queue.title: Local SEO lead gen — prospect discovery and scoring algorithm
queue.description: Build lib/prospect-scorer.js (opportunity scoring: authority score, missing keywords, review rating, technical issues, GBP gaps) and index-prospect.js CLI (--location, --niche, --limit flags). Uses Google Places API for business discovery, SEMRush for domain analysis, and site-review quick scan for technical issues. Saves scored prospects to prospects/<location>-<niche>.json. Email discovery via website scraping — mailto: links, JSON-LD LocalBusiness schema, contact page regex (lib/email-finder.js). No third-party email lookup API needed.

queue.title: Local SEO outreach — personalised email drafting via Claude
queue.description: Build multi-channel outreach system. index-outreach.js CLI with --prospect <slug> --channel email|gbp|whatsapp|social|all. Claude generates personalised messages per channel with tone/length adapted: email (150-250 words, professional), GBP message (50-80 words, customer-tone), WhatsApp (30-50 words, ultra-short), Instagram/Facebook DM (50-100 words, friendly). Each references specific prospect weaknesses tactfully + free mini-audit hook from site-review. Templates in lib/templates/outreach-{channel}-cold.md. Saves drafts to output/outreach/<prospect-slug>/{channel}.md. Multi-touch sequence: Day 0 best channel → Day 3 second channel → Day 7 follow-up → Day 14 final soft touch.

queue.title: News digest: scaffold tools/news-digest/ with config, sources.json, and feed fetcher
queue.description: Create tools/news-digest/ directory. Build config.js (dotenv, ANTHROPIC_API_KEY), sources.json (configurable feed list with RSS/HTML types, relevance context), and lib/fetch-feeds.js (fetch with AbortController timeout). Follow tools/site-review/ patterns exactly.

queue.title: News digest: RSS/Atom parser and HTML scraper with date filtering and dedup
queue.description: Build lib/parse-feed.js (fast-xml-parser RSS/Atom parsing, 7-day date filter, URL dedup) and lib/html-scraper.js (CSS selector extraction for sources without RSS feeds). Add fast-xml-parser to package.json dependencies.

queue.title: News digest: Claude API relevance scorer with batched scoring and 3-part summary
queue.description: Build lib/scorer.js — batch entries (chunks of 20) to Claude API for relevance scoring (0-1) and 3-part summary (what/why/workflow impact). Uses @anthropic-ai/sdk with temperature:0. Follow code-review.js Anthropic pattern.

queue.title: News digest: markdown digest writer, CLI orchestration, and state dedup
queue.description: Build lib/digest-writer.js (markdown output grouped by relevance tier: High/Notable/Watching) and index.js (CLI entry point orchestrating fetch→parse→score→write pipeline). State file (state.json) tracks seen URLs to prevent cross-week duplicates. Add npm script to root package.json.

queue.title: News digest: GitHub Actions weekly cron and local launchd documentation
queue.description: Create .github/workflows/news-digest.yml — weekly Monday 8am UTC cron, workflow_dispatch manual trigger, ANTHROPIC_API_KEY from secrets, auto-commit output. Document macOS launchd plist setup as backup scheduler.

queue.title: Fix replay() bugs: display:none not cleared, missing destroyLogoHover, no ScrollTrigger refresh
queue.description: Patch replay() in home-scroll-morph.js: (1) call _destroyLogoHover() before _splitLogoText() to prevent duplicate listeners, (2) clear inline display:none on upper/lower containers after _splitLogoText() so hover text is visible, (3) add ScrollTrigger.refresh() after _resizeHandler().

queue.title: Add click-to-scroll on .home-transition-dial during intro morph
queue.description: Add initDialClickToScroll() in orchestrator.js: clicking .home-transition-dial smooth-scrolls to the bottom of .section_home-intro so the morph plays through naturally. Works on initial load and after replay(). Guarded by data-dial-click-bound to prevent duplicate listeners.

queue.title: Replace API scan with local Claude Code slash command
queue.description: Create /vinted-scan slash command that reads photos + notes.md from inbox/ subfolders, applies vinted-listing skill for vision analysis, self-reviews for AI patterns, writes to Notion via MCP, and moves processed items to inbox/processed/. Eliminates ANTHROPIC_API_KEY dependency.

queue.title: Add TSC brand colours and scales to Webflow base variables
queue.description: Add 4 Pantone-matched brand colours (Ink, Cyan, Yellow, Steel) and their full scales (Cyan 7 steps, Ink 6 steps, Steel 8 steps) to the Cargo+ template Color/Base variable collection via Webflow MCP. Update 3 existing base variables (Base/Light, Lift/Light, Lift/Dark) to align with brand palette. 20 new variables + 3 updates = 23 MCP operations.

queue.title: Carsa VDP: externalise inline scripts to single CDN bundle and measure Lighthouse impact
queue.description: Baseline 6 VDP pages, concatenate 19 inline scripts into vdp.js, host on jsDelivr, run functional tests, re-run Lighthouse, diff results. Scripts kept as-is with jQuery deps.

queue.title: Carsa VDP: refactor to vanilla JS modules with init.js loader
queue.description: Review vdp.js, convert jQuery to vanilla ES2022+, deduplicate shared helpers, split into modular files with route-detecting init.js loader. Run acceptance tests on live site.

queue.title: Migrate service.carsa.co.uk to main Carsa site
queue.description: Migrate 8-page service microsite to carsa.co.uk/mot-and-car-servicing. New hub page (7 sections), CMS-driven location template (5 locations with Acuity embeds), winter health check page, cross-sell sections on store pages, JSON-LD schema, 301 redirects, SEO checks. Spec v2: MCP reconnected; Service Locations CMS mirrors the proven Sell Locations->Stores reference pattern (Stores is source of truth for hours/photos/address); reviews use the standard live Trustpilot widget; Storepoint dropped for the existing /stores locator. Only open decision is B10 (Trustpilot business unit HiQ vs Carsa).

queue.title: Scaffold Playwright visual regression system on Carsa repo
queue.description: Init package.json, playwright.config.js (desktop + mobile projects), .env.example, shared test helpers. Foundation for all subsequent tasks.

queue.title: Create page manifest with lite and full profiles
queue.description: pages.js with ~10 lite pages and ~22 full pages, tier classification (static/cms), mask selectors per CMS page.

queue.title: Write visual.spec.js with toHaveScreenshot and CMS masking
queue.description: Playwright visual regression spec iterating page manifest, applying locator-based masks for CMS pages, full-page screenshots at 1% threshold.

queue.title: Console error and broken link checks
queue.description: console-errors.spec.js (pageerror + console.error with third-party filter) and broken-links.spec.js (HEAD requests, 404/timeout detection).

queue.title: GitHub Actions workflow and Slack notification
queue.description: visual-regression.yml (cron weekdays 7am UTC + workflow_dispatch with profile/baseline inputs), notify-slack.js, update-baselines.sh helper.

queue.title: Generate initial baselines and QA
queue.description: Run --update-snapshots for full suite, spot-check baseline screenshots, run comparison pass to confirm green, verify Slack notification format.

queue.title: Resize curated photos to measured sizes and export AVIF
queue.description: Measure live render widths at 1440 and 479 for the 40 curated hi-res photos, compute 2x retina targets, cluster into size buckets (730/960/1180/1500/2850), and encode one AVIF per image and bucket with magick and avifenc. 18 images render on-page (35 AVIF outputs, 98.9 percent smaller); 22 sources are never used on any page and are flagged for removal. Output to Downloads website-selects optimised bucket folders; re-upload to Webflow is a separate manual step.
